title: Eggcellent Villager Transport
description: Villagers too hard to move with Boats or Minecarts? Why not use Eggs instead!
body:
# Eggcellent Villager Transport
Hey, you! Yeah, **YOU**!

Does it always feel like moving Villagers by Boat or Minecart is such a hassle? Do you wish you had something better?

Well, look no further! Eggcellent Villager Transport is the datapack for you! This pack allows you to turn your Villagers into Spawn Eggs for far easier transportation! No more laying miles of tracks or scooting along the grass in a Boat. Now you can simply pick up a Villager and go!

# Installation
To install this pack, simply drop it into the `datapacks` folder in your world save (no need to unzip it). Then run the function `evt:init` to initiate the datapack. (This will be changed in future versions so the pack starts itself.)

# How To Use
Throw an Egg at a Villager to convert it into a Spawn Egg. Place the Spawn Egg into an Item Frame (on the top of a block/on the ground) to summon the Villager. 

# Features
  - Gives the Item Frame back to the player who placed the Spawn Egg into the Item Frame
- Prevents any negative gossip a player would recieve from throwing an Egg at the Villager
- Clears all Job Site, Bed and Meeting Point data to allow the summoned Villager to claim new ones
- Spawn Egg cannot be placed in Survival (to prevent usage on Spawners)
- Can handle multiple summonings at once

# Credits
Thanks to these users on Reddit for helping me figure out how to go about getting certain aspects of the pack to function correctly:
- [GalSergey](https://www.reddit.com/user/GalSergey/)
- [Brianthecoo](https://www.reddit.com/user/Brianthecoo/)
- [Potential-Macaron-34](https://www.reddit.com/user/Potential-Macaron-34/)
